methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs with a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, explicit ownership, and measurable key results.
description: KTLO objectives for shared reliability and compliance work.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe customer and business outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure meaningful movement on customer or business KPIs.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Maintain marketplace integrity for trust, payments, and policy
companyObjectives.statement: Keep Amazon's commerce platform reliable enough that shoppers, sellers, and advertisers can trust it at scale.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Marketplace integrity KTLO goal
objectives.objective: Reduce operational risk across trust, authenticity, and shared commerce controls.

keyResults.metric: Severe trust and authenticity incident rate
keyResults.target: Keep below 0.20% of eligible commerce events
keyResults.statement: Keep trust and authenticity incidents within tolerance.

executingTeams.intent: Maintain abuse detection, authenticity, and policy quality.

supportingTeams.intent: Maintain shared measurement and detection data quality.
